items.title: Commercial Finance Director
items.description:
IPL Schoeller | Who We Are

On July 1, 2025, IPL Plastics merged with Schoeller Allibert to form IPL Schoeller (the ‘company’). Its operations are split across North America (11 manufacturing plants), The UK and Lommel (6 manufacturing plants) and Europe (9 manufacturing plants). The company is headquartered in Dublin, Ireland. IPL Schoeller is a leading manufacturer of sustainable rigid packaging solutions across a range of end market segments including returnable transit packaging, consumer an

items.description:

Chief Financial Officer Dublin West | Hybrid


Overview
Re:work is assisting a key client with the build-out of their senior leadership team. As part of that engagement, we are now recruiting a Chief Financial Officer to lead the finance function within a large, safety-critical transport organisation based in Dublin. items.title: Chief Financial Officer / Head of Finance & Operations
items.description:
Augmented Energy | 
Augmented Energy is building the next generation of energy operations for a more flexible, data-driven and decentralized electricity system.

We operate at the intersection of electricity markets, forecasting, automation, supply, aggregation and risk management. Our work helps producers, suppliers and large energy consumers manage their exposure to complex electricity markets, while making operational processes more scalable, reliable and automated.
